name: Resonance Blade [S]
description: Forged in the Forge of Stars using crystal-resonance metalworking that the surface world does not have the theory for yet. The blade is aligned at the molecular level with a specific harmonic frequency — not heat-drawn, sound-shaped. Lighter than it looks. Holds an edge without sharpening because the crystal alignment does the work the grinding stone would. There is a faint warmth to it that has nothing to do with use or storage. The warmth is structural.
